original_image_tags: Aged, off-white envelope, torn at the top left corner and showing a small hole/puncture at the bottom right.

elements.description: One purple United States postage stamp depicting a profile bust, labeled 'UNITED STATES POSTAGE' and '3 CENTS 3'. A black circular postmark is stamped over it reading 'NEW YORK, N.Y. JUL 11 930PM 1947'. A horizontal cancellation stamp reads 'GRAND CENTRAL STATION'.

judge.reason: Description A discusses an envelope with specific damage, while Description B describes a postage stamp with text, which are entirely different visual content.
